products.description: Argentina soccer jersey with Climacool+ technology for a cool and focused performance. The Argentina 26 Home Messi Authentic Jersey unites soccer heritage with forward-thinking design. Marking the first appearance of Argentina’s third World Cup winners’ star, it honors the team’s legacy and fearless identity. Crafted in knit jacquard with a slim, performance fit, it’s built to move with precision.
products.fabricDetails:
- Premium Imported Player Edition
-  Main Material: 100% Polyester (100% Recycled)
-  CLIMACOOL+ technology
-  Sweat-wicking & Quick drying
- Product color: White / Icey Blue / Light BluE

products.description: Authentic jersey with sweat-wicking, quick-drying fabric for comfort. A tribute to the spirit of Argentina, the Argentina 26 Away Authentic Jersey captures the passion and artistry of Argentine culture. With its bold swirling design, the jersey is inspired by popular artistic expressions. Designed for those who live and breathe soccer, it combines style with performance. Climacool+ technology helps you stay fresh, cool, and comfortable throughout your game. Crafted with a higher crew neck, this adidas jersey offers a tailored fit that feels locked-in, thanks to body mapping technology. A heat-applied label and UV-print serve as a seal of authenticity
products.fabricDetails:
-  Premium Imported Player Edition
- Main Material: 100% Polyester(100% Recycled)
-  CLIMACOOL+ technology
- Sweat-wicking & Quick drying
- Jacquard knit fabric
- Product color: Black / Lucid Blue / Blue Burst

products.description: Portugal’s Home Kit channels the energy of the ocean and the intensity of a team ready to make waves on the biggest stage. The iconic red base is layered with a wavy pattern and green accents, a nod to the country’s maritime roots and fearless spirit. It’s a design that speaks to those who were born to explore and live to play por amor à camisola. The match-ready, Authentic version of the jersey is made with PUMA’s ULTRAWEAVE fabric and features an athletic fit for elite-level performance.
products.fabricDetails:
- Premium Imported Player Edition
- Main Material: Rib: 97% Polyester, 3% Elastane Inserts: 100% Polyester Shell: 50% Elastomultiester, 50% Polyester
- LIGHT:ULTRAWEAVE technology COMFORT: dryCELL and ThermoAdapt technologies
- Sweat-wicking & Quick drying
-  Jacquard knit fabric
- Product color: Club Red-Green Lagoon

products.description: The Spain 26 Away Authentic Jersey showcases Spain’s rich literary heritage with intricate manuscript-inspired graphics, symbolizing the cultural depth of the Spanish language, uniting culture and soccer. Designed for game-day performance, it blends tradition with modern function, incorporating Climacool+ technology to help keep you dry and cool. A slim fit and crew neck deliver a timeless, athletic look. A herringbone tape 3-Stripes provides a clean, sharp finish. Combining heritage with performance, this adidas jersey is a must-have choice for those who value style, comfort and innovation on the field.

products.description: The Germany 26 Home Authentic Jersey is a symbol of heritage and innovation. Drawing inspiration from iconic moments, this jersey is designed to be the icon of tomorrow. This jersey is crafted with Climacool+ technology. Advanced cooling. With Climacool+ technology, superior engineering and advanced materials unite for a cool, dry, and distraction-free performance. Crafted with precision, the jersey features a contrast color collar and EQT collar with tape, adding a touch of style to your game. The sweat-wicking materials are strategically placed in high sweat zones, helping you feel comfortable throughout the match. adidas branding is subtly integrated with lenticular heat transfer logos and perforated 3-Stripes tape, showcasing the brand's commitment to quality and design. Get ready to make a statement with this cool piece.
